title: Marketplace Website
short: A full-stack marketplace for digital goods and gaming services with payments, concurrency, and admin tooling.
summary: Built a scalable marketplace experience for virtual goods and gaming services, combining a polished storefront with transactional backend systems.
description: Developed a full-stack marketplace platform for virtual goods and gaming-related services using React.js, Express.js, MySQL, and Redis.
Designed backend architecture for concurrent order processing and transactional consistency.
Integrated payment gateways, user verification systems, and third-party providers.
Implemented order management, admin dashboards, and security controls based on OWASP best practices.

title: AI Image Generation Platform
short: An AI-powered product for transforming text prompts into customized artwork with usage credits and dashboards.
summary: Delivered an AI image generation experience with prompt-driven generation, subscription-style credit handling, and a business-friendly admin layer.
description: Built the frontend with Next.js and connected the service to the ChatGPT Sora API.
Implemented user authentication, credit management, and generation usage logic.
Designed core features for user administration, transaction tracking, and internal control tools.

title: Deekub
short: A location-based social platform for nightlife venues with real-time interactions and discovery features.
summary: Created a mobile-first social platform connecting nightlife venues in Bangkok through location-aware experiences and real-time features.
description: Built scalable backend services with clean architecture and dependency injection.
Developed a cross-platform mobile app with real-time messaging, venue check-ins, and social discovery.
Implemented REST APIs, authentication, media storage, notifications, and deployment pipelines.

title: Business Platform & Admin Systems
short: Custom web products for business workflows, dashboards, and internal operations.
summary: Delivered custom business-platform solutions with secure dashboards, workflows, and reliable deployment setups.
description: Built internal and client-facing dashboards with role-based access and workflow management.
Delivered maintainable web applications using modern frontends and backend APIs.
Supported business operations through automation, monitoring, and efficient deployment practices.
